definition.en: The outer ego directs the manipulation of this gestalt in the physical universe.
definition.zh: 外在自我指导这个完形在物质宇宙中的操控。

definition.en: The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego.
definition.zh: 外在自我不过是内在自我的仿造影像。

definition.en: The outer ego must concentrate much of its energy toward survival in and manipulation of the outer camouflage world.
definition.zh: 外在自我必须将其大部分能量集中于在外部伪装世界中的生存和操控。

definition.en: The outer ego is shielded from direct experience of reality because it could not take the impact of such experience.
definition.zh: 外在自我被屏蔽于对实相的直接体验，因为它无法承受这种体验的冲击。

definition.en: The outer ego is forced into what could be called successive action, but the inner ego is not so bound.
definition.zh: 外在自我被迫进入可称为连续行动的状态，但内在自我不受此束缚。

explanation: 外在自我意识是整体自我面向物质世界的表层部分，专注于在物理宇宙中操控和生存。它通过外在感官感知现实，处理伪装模式，但视野狭窄，无法直接体验内在实相。内在自我意识则负责维持整个自我的根基与平衡，通过内在感官接收来自整体存有的讯息，并指挥能量场。外在自我意识本质上是内在自我意识的镜像或仿制品，它往往否认内在自我的存在，因为直接面对内在实相会冲击其自认为至高的认知。然而，外在自我意识可以通过调整焦点，与内在自我意识对齐，从而有意识地体验内在实相，并将这种知识应用于自身领域。当外在自我意识过于狭隘、未能充分代表潜意识中的次要人格时，这些人格可能趁其虚弱时短暂接管某些功能。随着意识进化，

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时启用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就已察觉危险。内在自我致力于维持整个自我的根基与平衡——这至关重要——并且对来自整体存有的讯息保持开放。它通过内在感官接收讯息，能感知到外在自我因其专门化而无法承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我理应在一定程度上代表仍潜藏于潜意识中的次主导人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能妥善代表这些次主导人格时，它们便会揭竿而起，并在条件有利时试图通过主导自我的短暂弱点来表达自己。但即便不如此，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）来表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As far as self and not-self are concerned, the unit of self is organized, as you know, by the inner ego, which directs the whole energy field. The outer ego directs the manipulation of this gestalt in the physical universe. The outer ego is rather more tied to physical properties, and yet it can directly experience inner reality by a change of focus through aligning itself with the inner ego, focusing its energies with the inner rather than the outer senses. This is by far the most advantageous method of experiencing inner reality, because the outer ego is therefore consciously aware of what has been going on, and can use such knowledge in its own sphere.
quotes.translation: 就自我与非自我而言，自我单元是由内在自我组织的——如你所知——它统御着整个能量场。外在自我则指挥这个完形在物质宇宙中的操控。外在自我更受制于物质属性，然而它可以通过调整焦点，与内在自我对齐，将能量聚焦于内在感官而非外在感官，从而直接体验内在实相。这无疑是体验内在实相最有利的方法，因为外在自我因此能清醒地意识到所发生之事，并在其自身领域运用这些知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我对外在自我了如指掌。外在自我不过是内在自我的一个仿冒影像。外在自我通常无法察觉你此刻可能认为的内在自我的思想或沟通；但内在自我知道你迈出的每一步、你呼吸的每一粒空气、你做的每一个梦；它是你自身人格的源头，也是它所隶属的存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In many respects it is a reflector, the surface of the self looking outward. While this is necessary, the whole remainder of the self could not be left to an organizer or caretaker who did not focus his attentions within the depths but sat, as it were, on the front porch of the house, leaving the inner workings unattended. The outer ego does not want to meet the inner ego. The outer ego does not want to admit the existence of the inner ego. As the eye cannot see its own pupil without a mirror, so the outer ego could not even see itself, were it not that the inner ego hides in the depths of all reflections.
quotes.translation: 在许多方面，它是一面反射镜，是面向外界的自我表层。虽然这有其必要性，但自我的其余部分不能交给一个不关注内在深处、反而坐在房屋前廊上、任由内在运作无人照管的管理者或看护者。外在自我不愿遇见内在自我。外在自我不愿承认内在自我的存在。正如眼睛没有镜子就无法看见自己的瞳孔，外在自我甚至无法看见自己，若非内在自我隐藏在所有反射的深处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The fact is that the whole self is constantly experiencing data from all of the inner senses. The inner ego is of course aware of this. The subconscious is sometimes aware of this, and the outer ego is aware of very little. I have explained the reasons for this in past sessions. The outer ego must concentrate much of its energy toward survival in and manipulation of the outer camouflage world. This world has already been created by the inner self, and its continuing existence is determined by the constant vigilance of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 事实是，整个自我持续不断地体验来自所有内在感官的数据。内在自我当然知道这一点。潜意识有时也知道这一点，而外在自我所知甚少。我在过去的课中解释过其原因。外在自我必须将大部分能量集中于外在伪装世界的生存与操控。这个世界已由内在自我创造，其持续存在取决于内在自我的持续警觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In the various levels of existence the inner and outer egos begin to merge. Gradually direct experience of inner reality is spoon-fed by the inner ego through the mouth of the subconscious to the outer ego. The division between the inner and outer egos is necessary for other reasons than the nature of direct experience itself. That is, the outer ego is shielded from direct experience of reality because it could not take the impact of such experience. But this is not the only reason.
quotes.translation: 在存在的各个层面，内在与外在自我开始融合。逐渐地，内在自我通过潜意识的嘴巴，将内在实相的直接经验一勺勺地喂给外在自我。内在与外在自我的划分，除了直接经验本身的性质之外，还有其他原因。也就是说，外在自我被屏蔽于对实相的直接经验之外，因为它无法承受这种经验的冲击。但这并非唯一的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is the ego or directive consciousness behind all personified aspects of the subconscious; in dormant fashion however, and contrary to Jung's propositions, within the subconscious and in those personified aspects of it will be found remnant memory personalities of past reincarnated selves. They may be called shadows and yet they are not powerless. The inner ego, the directive organizer of the subconscious, also is the part of the self which is familiar with activities and methods of which the outer ego is ignorant. It is this organizer who directs not only the movements of the physical body from within, but directs from within those intimate survival mechanisms, without which the physical body could not exist, and upon which the existence of the outer ego is so dependent.
quotes.translation: 它是潜意识所有拟人化面向背后的自我或指令性意识；然而，与荣格的命题相反，在潜意识及其拟人化面向中，将以休眠状态发现过去转世自我的残余记忆人格。它们可被称为阴影，却并非无力。内在自我，即潜意识的指令性组织者，也是熟悉外在自我所不知的活动与方法的自我部分。正是这位组织者不仅从内在指挥肉体的运动，还从内在指挥那些精密的生存机制——若无这些机制，肉体无法存在，而外在自我的存在如此依赖它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This sort of experience will always be shielded from the outer ego of necessity. Even a watered-down version of a direct inner experience is a shock to the outer ego on your plane, since the ego imagines itself and its own perceptions to be supreme. You have no idea, even with what training you have, of how shattering such a complete experience would be to the outer ego, so we will take one inner-sense experience at a time.
quotes.translation: 这类体验必然始终对外在自我有所遮蔽。即便经过稀释的直接内在体验，在你这个层面上也会对外在自我造成冲击，因为自我自认为其本身及其感知至高无上。即使以你现有的训练，也无法想象如此完整的体验对外在自我会造成何等粉碎性的影响，因此我们将一次只进行一种内在感官体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Identity is no longer limited to the outer ego alone. The outer ego is now familiar with the whole self, or the entire identity, and has available to it strength of which it was not previously aware. In periods of exuberance, when you are working well, and your health is extraordinarily good, when you are able to remember and manipulate your dreams, then such periods are signs of the emergence of this new consciousness.
quotes.translation: 身份不再仅限于外在自我。外在自我如今熟悉了整个自我或完整身份，并能运用它先前未曾觉察的力量。在精力充沛的时期——当你工作顺利、健康极佳、能够记忆并操控梦境时——这样的时期正是这种新意识浮现的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The outer ego is very seldom aware of the inner ego, and the subconscious is indeed a vast area dividing them. We are discussing now the outer ego in relation to the inner ego, and describing a situation in terms of relationships. Other relationships would show both the outer and inner egos in a different light. Relationships are also the result of tensions, and each action sets up a new tension.
quotes.translation: 外在自我极少意识到内在自我，而潜意识确实是分隔两者的广阔领域。我们现在讨论的是外在自我与内在自我的关系，并以关系的角度来描述情境。其他关系则会从不同视角展现外在自我与内在自我。关系也是张力的结果，每个行动都会建立新的张力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当达到某种程度的自信时，外在自我才能熟悉这些内在运作——至少在你们的层面上如此。否则你们会步履蹒跚。通常来说，即使整体自体能够组织所有内在感官传来的资料，潜意识也极少能全盘接收这类讯息；而专注于伪装模式、且生来就为处理伪装模式而存在的外在自我，根本承受不了完整内在感官带来的认知冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the outer ego, from the surface of its consciousness, reflects the outer world, it sees reflections of the inner ego which are the images within its own eye; and as the self creates matter subconsciously within its own eye, and as the self creates matter subconsciously and not consciously, and as the self creates matter in line with inner and not outer expectations, so then does the ego, in viewing the material universe, come face to face with the face of its own inner ego; and the outer ego cannot escape from this inner self.
quotes.translation: 当外在自我从意识表层映照外在世界时，它看见的是内在自我的倒影——这些影像存在于它自身的眼中；正如自体在潜意识层面（而非意识层面）于自身眼中创造物质，且自体依据内在而非外在期待创造物质，因此当自我审视物质宇宙时，便与自身内在自我的面容正面相遇；外在自我无法逃离这个内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Although someone begins reading this material on page one, for example, this does not mean that page four hundred does not already exist. Your outer ego is forced into what could be called successive action, but the inner ego is not so bound. This should make the point more clear. I mentioned earlier that cause and effect operates in various manners, and what seems to be cause and effect is often merely a result of your necessary disposition to view actions in a successive manner.
quotes.translation: 虽然有人从第一页开始阅读这份资料，但这并不表示第四百页尚未存在。你们的外在自我被迫进入可称为连续行动的状态，但内在自我却不受此限制。这应该能让观点更清晰。我先前提到因果以多种方式运作，看似因果的现象往往只是你们必须将行动视为连续序列的倾向所致。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What happened was this. When the conscious ego desires information, and when the outer ego is in full control, then the information is sought from the outer senses. When the outer ego is caught unawares and information is requested, the subconscious often delivers it through the use of the inner senses. You will see that this was the case.
quotes.translation: 实际情况是这样的。当意识自我渴望信息，且外在自我完全掌控时，信息便通过外在感官寻求。当外在自我猝不及防而信息被索取时，潜意识常通过内在感官传递信息。你们会发现这正是当时的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many limitations are set upon personalities by their own entities for karmic reasons. I want to make it plain that free will does exist, but that it is limited through use of a more extended free will on the part of the entity. Also, the inner ego is aware of so-called future decisions not because he forces such decisions upon the outer ego but simply because the future as such does not exist to the inner ego, and therefore he can perceive where the outer ego cannot.
quotes.translation: 许多人格因业力缘由被其自身存有设下限制。我要明确说明：自由意志确实存在，但通过存有层面更扩展的自由意志运用而受到限制。此外，内在自我知晓所谓的未来决定，并非因为它将此类决定强加于外在自我，而仅仅是因为未来本身对内在自我而言并不存在，因此它能看见外在自我所不能见之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不是说外在自我是个傀儡。而是说外在自我远不如内在自我或内在自体那般有意识，它的感知能力较弱，尽管它极力伪装出稳定性，实际上却远不如内在自我稳定；它源自内在自体，但意识程度较低而非较高。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Tuesday does not exist to the inner ego. Your outer ego is now experiencing the camouflage time year of 1964. This simply does not exist to the inner ego, therefore the inner ego is effortlessly aware of any choices or decisions that you may make freely in say 1970. It does not affect your choice. It has absolutely nothing to do with whatever future choice you may make. It is aware of such future choices simply because the camouflage future does not exist for it.
quotes.translation: 星期二对内在自我而言并不存在。你的外在自我此刻正在体验1964年的伪装时间年。这对内在自我而言根本不存在，因此内在自我能毫不费力地觉察到你在1970年可能自由做出的任何选择或决定。它不会影响你的选择，也与你未来可能做出的任何选择毫无关联。它之所以能觉察到这些未来选择，仅仅是因为伪装未来对它而言并不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 现在，这种感知如同所有其他内在感官一样，正被内在有意识自我所运用，但外在自我不被允许觉察这些层面。这些内在感官的信息在通过潜意识筛选后，仅有最低限度的信息被传递给外在自我。但确实只有最低限度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Clairvoyance exists and is possible because of its basis within the spacious present, and this is not known because man will not accept the available data. Clairvoyance exists because matter and energy are one and the same thing. There is clairvoyance within the organs of the physical body itself, because the organs of the body are not, quote, "just" matter, but energy which has composed itself into matter. Such inner data continually and automatically is accepted by every other portion of the human framework except by the outer ego. Even this outer ego, however, acts all unknowingly often on the basis of such information, which it will not admit it has received; and often such action saves it from dire circumstances.
quotes.translation: 千里眼之所以存在且可能实现，是因为它根植于广袤的当下，而人类之所以不知晓这一点，是因为不愿接受可用的数据。千里眼之所以存在，是因为物质与能量是同一回事。在物质身体本身的器官内也存在千里眼，因为身体的器官并非——引用——“只是”物质，而是已将自己凝聚成物质的能量。这种内在数据持续且自动地被人类结构的其他每一部分所接受，唯独外在自我除外。然而，即使是这个外在自我，也常常在不知不觉中依据这类它不肯承认已接收到的信息行事；而这类行动往往能使其免于陷入险境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The energy of this inner self is directed and used by it to richly form from itself, from components and inner experience, a material counterpart in which the outer ego then can act out its role. The outer ego is most in the role, acting out a play that the inner self has written.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我的能量由它引导和运用，以从自身、从组成部分及内在经验中，丰富地塑造出一个物质对应物，外在自我随后便可在其中扮演其角色。外在自我最投入于角色之中，演绎着内在自我已写就的剧本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner ego has experienced, then, objectivity, and has returned to a subjective state. It is a relative storehouse of energy, and it is capable of aiding the outer ego when certain conditions arise. The inner ego may be termed the unfamiliar "I". In many cases it is the I who dreams, bringing valuable information to the personal subconscious, information that may be then used for the benefit of the outer ego itself.
quotes.translation: 内在自我已体验过客观性，并已回归到主观状态。它是一个相对的能量库，当特定条件出现时，它能够协助外在自我。内在自我可被称为陌生的“我”。在许多情况下，正是这个“我”在做梦，将宝贵的信息带入个人潜意识，这些信息随后可被用于外在自我自身的利益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego directs all activities which are deeply subjective. The outer ego as you know deals with the manipulation of the self in the physical environment. You must remember that the whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same. It is therefore impossible at any moment to pinpoint the personality. Therefore the whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be. For as I have explained action is simultaneous, and time as you think of it is caused by your own physical perception.
quotes.translation: 内在自我主导所有深具主观性的活动。你所知的外在自我则处理物质环境中自我的操控。你必须记住，整体自我大于其各部分的总和；同时，由于它是行动，它永远不会相同。因此，在任何时刻都不可能精准定位人格。所以整体自我不仅是你时间中已知的人格总和，更是它过去与未来所是的一切总和。正如我所解释的，行动是同时性的，而你所认为的时间是由你自身的物质感知所造成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The outer ego then remains at the end a controller and director of those strengths which it gathered about itself during its particular existence. But even this is not the end. It, that is it meaning the outer ego, can even continue growth and development after a particular existence, according to its inherent ability and according to its ability to communicate with the basic inner self.
quotes.translation: 外在自我最终仍会是它在特定存在期间所聚集力量的掌控者与引导者。但即便如此也并非终点。它——即外在自我——甚至能根据其固有能力和与基本内在自我沟通的能力，在特定存在之后继续成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是荣格所称无意识经验的组织者。内在自我是我们所谓内在自我的另一个术语。正如外在自我在环境与物质现实中运作，内在自我或内在自我则在内在现实中组织与运作。内在自我创造了外在自我随后处理的那个物质现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But the outer ego as you know is that portion of the whole self that is given over to the maintenance of physical manipulations, and it perceives only through those physical equipment, those outer senses. It sees its dominion in jeopardy and rises up in arms. It, the ego, is that small portion of the whole self which the whole self has allowed to be completely, or almost completely, bewitched by the self-hypnotic trance. It is that portion which believes implicitly in the given specifications of the hypnotist, and as such it will be last to leave the trance.
quotes.translation: 但你认知的外在自我，是整体自我中负责维持物质操控的那部分，它仅通过那些物质装备、那些外在感官来感知。它眼见自己的领域岌岌可危，便奋起反抗。这个自我，是整体自我中那个被允许完全或几乎完全被自我催眠状态所迷惑的小部分。它绝对相信催眠师给出的特定指令，因此也将是最后一个脱离催眠状态的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now at times I will be using the term "camouflage," referring to the physical world to which the outer ego relates, for physical form is one of the camouflages that reality adopts. The camouflage is real, and yet there is a much greater reality within it -- the vitality that gave it form. Your physical senses then allow you to perceive this camouflage, for they are attuned to it in a highly specialized manner. But to sense the reality within the form requires a different sort of attention, and more delicate manipulations than the physical senses provide.
quotes.translation: 现在有时我会使用"伪装"这个术语，指涉外在自我所关联的物质世界，因为物质形态是实相所采用的伪装之一。这伪装是真实的，但其中存在着更伟大的实相——赋予它形态的生命力。你的物质感官让你得以感知这伪装，因为它们以高度专门化的方式与之调谐。但要感知形态内的实相，则需要不同于物质感官所提供的注意力与更精微的运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 通过在不同存在层面的经验，内在自我与外在自我逐渐趋近。潜意识最终消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你目前的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自我中自觉性最高的部分，拥有最强的感知与组织能力。唯有它能直接即刻体验内在实相与基本实相。唯有它能应对这种直接实相体验的狂野本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the two are in balance and when there is communication between them, then the inner ego can directly communicate with the outer ego, bring to it the necessary enlightenments, and give it, that is give the outer ego the benefit of its own, the inner ego's own, condensed comprehension and direct participation in the existence of the universe as a whole.
quotes.translation: 当两者处于平衡状态且彼此沟通时，内在自我便能直接与外在自我交流，为其带来必要的启迪，并赋予外在自我——即让外在自我受益于内在自我本身那种浓缩的理解力，以及直接参与宇宙整体存在的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The combined molecular consciousnesses, retaining identity, form a gestalt consciousness that is the ego, the outer ego, that is in turn utilized by the consciousness of the inner ego. The inner ego being unhampered by the laws of your plane, once having entered your plane at physical birth, can therefore leave the physical body and then reconstruct it.
quotes.translation: 结合后的分子意识在保持各自特性的同时，形成一种完形意识，这便是自我，即外在自我，而它又被内在自我的意识所运用。内在自我不受你们物质层面法则的束缚，一旦在物质出生时进入你们的层面，便能离开肉体并重新构建它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is focused inward, with as much intensity as the outer ego is focused outward. This inner ego is in many respects a composite, as indeed to a lesser degree the outer ego is a composite.
quotes.translation: 内在自我向内聚焦，其专注程度与外在自我向外聚焦的程度相当。这个内在自我在许多方面是一个复合体，正如在较小程度上外在自我也是一个复合体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your clock time as you know is camouflage, and does not exist as far as the inner ego is concerned. This certainly should not be strange to you, since you know that even your present personalities can to some extent escape from clock time through the use of psychological time. I have said that there is no time without barriers. The inner ego is aware of fewer barriers and therefore is not bound by time to the degree that the outer ego is bound.
quotes.translation: 你们所知的时钟时间是伪装，就内在自我而言它并不存在。这当然不该令你们感到陌生，因为你们知道，即便是你们当前的人格，也能通过运用心理时间在某种程度上摆脱时钟时间。我曾说过，没有障碍就没有时间。内在自我觉察到的障碍较少，因此不像外在自我那样受时间束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is thinned out further by my own subconscious, because my inner and outer egos are not yet a complete unity, although I am, or my outer ego is, in direct contact with my inner ego on some occasions. Nevertheless my subconscious is not yet dispensed with but is still retained somewhat in the order of your archaic appendix.
quotes.translation: 它被我的潜意识进一步稀释了，因为我的内在自我与外在自我尚未完全统一——尽管在某些场合我（或我的外在自我）与内在自我有直接接触。然而我的潜意识尚未被摒弃，仍像你们那退化的阑尾一样被保留着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The prime factor of course is the individual's ability to avail himself of energy, and then to utilize it effectively. Coordination and communication between the inner and outer ego is also a strong factor here. You must also keep in mind that the individual creates his own environment through his successive incarnations.
quotes.translation: 首要因素当然是个人运用能量并有效利用它的能力。内在自我与外在自我之间的协调与沟通在此也是重要因素。你们还必须谨记，个体通过其连续转世创造自身所处的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As the outer ego is constantly creative, so is the inner ego. The focus in which the creativity occurs is merely different. The subconscious could be thought of as a nucleus, surrounded by the inner and outer egos. Certain tensions are maintained here, and all communications, incidentally, are the results of tensions.
quotes.translation: 外我不断创造，内我亦然。创造力发生的焦点仅有所不同。潜意识可被视为一个核心，被内我与外我所环绕。此处维持着特定的张力，所有沟通，顺便一提，都是张力的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The outer ego is not continuously, in your terms, aware of anything. It frequently forgets itself. When it becomes swept up in a strong emotion it seems to lose itself. There is unity then but no sense of apartness. When it most vigorously maintains its sense of individuality it is no longer aware of unity-with.
quotes.translation: 以你们的角度而言，外我并非持续觉知任何事物。它时常遗忘自身。当它被强烈情绪席卷时，似乎会迷失自我。此时存在一体性，却无分离感。当它最强烈地维持个体感时，便不再觉知与万物合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is extremely difficult, I should imagine. Nevertheless, even when an inner self has sent out a new outer ego upon a new camouflage venture, the previous ego is still afforded an almost unlimited avenue for development. There are many possibilities for it. It can choose to remain what it is, one ego. It will then remain in a somewhat subordinate position to the inner self, but in no more of a subordinate position than it was earlier.
quotes.translation: 这想必极为困难。然而，即便当内我派遣新的外我踏上新的伪装冒险时，先前的自我仍被赋予几乎无限的发展途径。它拥有诸多可能性：可以选择维持原状，作为一个自我存在。届时它将处于对内我而言略为从属的位置，但不会比先前更从属。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You would find it difficult to attend to or be aware of regular outer stimuli while you dealt with the ordinary function of daily life. Is it then any wonder that the outer ego leaves the inner data to the safekeeping of the inner ego? You are truly babes in the woods, having enough trouble getting along in your own universe. And do not get your feelings hurt, I am not referring to either of you in particular, as you should know by now.
quotes.translation: 你会发现，在处理日常生活的普通功能时，很难同时关注或意识到常规的外在刺激。那么，外在自我将内在数据交由内在自我保管，又有什么好奇怪的呢？你们真是林中的婴儿，在自己的宇宙里生存已经够困难了。别觉得伤感情，我并非特指你们两位，你们现在应该明白这一点了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As the intense experience of great joy or pain often blots out everything else, so would the direct experience of reality blot out, only completely, the outer ego who experienced it directly. At your level the sieve of the subconscious is a necessity and that is one of the main reasons why Ruburt dissociates during our sessions, even though his experience of inner reality is received second handed, so to speak, through me.
quotes.translation: 正如极度喜悦或痛苦的强烈体验常常会抹去其他一切，对实相的直接体验也会抹去——而且是彻底地——直接体验它的外在自我。在你们的层次上，潜意识的筛子是必要的，这也是鲁柏在我们的课程中解离的主要原因之一，尽管他对内在实相的体验可以说是通过我间接获得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This concept is hardly a new one. It is not a generally accepted theory, but it has ancient roots. When you carry the waking I into the dream state, this is one approach to this different consciousness. There is also an opening up that can occur in the waking condition. When this occurs the inner and outer egos merge. The outer ego recognizes its own duties, but it is aware that more is involved.
quotes.translation: 这个概念并非新创。它并非普遍接受的理论，但有着古老的根源。当你将清醒的自我带入梦境状态时，这是接近这种不同意识的一种途径。在清醒状态下也可能发生一种开启。当这种情况发生时，内在自我和外在自我会融合。外在自我认识到自己的职责，但它意识到还有更多的东西牵涉其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is this inner director who maintains all of these functions, and who is responsible for the physical health. It is this director to whom you must communicate when health fails. There are ways of doing this which we will discuss at later date. It is this inner director who chooses the dream symbols in such a way that they will be meaningful to all layers or areas of the subconscious, and who is responsible for the amount, rate and type of subconscious data which is given to the outer ego by means of the intuitions.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在指导者维持着所有这些功能，并负责身体的健康。当健康出现问题时，你必须与这个指导者沟通。我们将在日后讨论达成此目的的方法。正是这个内在指导者选择梦境象征符号，使其对潜意识的各个层面或领域都具有意义，并负责通过直觉传递给外在自我的潜意识数据的数量、速率和类型。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I did not realize that this particular experience would occur so early. It actually represents an amazing ability to focus the complete inner energy. In other words, to command and focus the entire amount of energy inherent within the personality from the inner universe, and as such it must be used with discretion and discipline. It should never be allowed to be used for the purposes of the emotions belonging to the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 我未曾预料到这次特殊体验会如此早地发生。它实际上展现了聚焦全部内在能量的惊人能力。换言之，就是命令并聚焦来自内在宇宙的人格所固有的全部能量，因此必须谨慎且有纪律地运用。绝不允许将其用于属于外在自我的情绪目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are certain requirements as you remember that must be met, upon your plane and upon others. Yet an ego, an outer ego, cannot choose to be an entity in any case until its comprehension attains a certain degree. And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you also that you are part of that same entity; and this is one of the main reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 如你所记得的，在你的层面及其他层面，必须满足某些特定要求。然而，一个自我，一个外在自我，在其理解力达到一定程度之前，无论如何都无法选择成为一个存有。现在，我亲爱的病人约瑟夫，请容我告诉你，你也是同一个存有的一部分；这正是我能够与你们两人沟通的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动能独立存在。没有孤立的行动。这种可能性基本上毫无意义。紧张状态也不会孤立存在。在所有这些事务中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自我的所有其他面向内部，也存在着持续不断的行动脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Through the inner senses then, you may perceive the inner laws, and remember that the inner ego knows what it is about. The intellect of the outer ego is but a pale image of your own inner ego. We will also go into this later.
quotes.translation: 因此，通过内在感官，你可以感知内在法则，并记住内在自我清楚自己的意图。外在自我的智力不过是内在自我苍白无力的映像。我们稍后还会深入探讨这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What you have in the spider's activity amounts to a demonstration of the sixth inner sense almost in its pure form. The spider has no intellect or outer ego, and his manipulations are the direct result of activities performed by pure and spontaneous use of the inner senses. They are unhampered and un-camouflaged to a great extent.
quotes.translation: 蜘蛛的活动所展现的，几乎是第六种内在感官纯粹形式的示范。蜘蛛没有智力或外在自我，它的操控行为是纯粹而自发地运用内在感官所产生活动的直接结果。这些活动在很大程度上不受阻碍，也未被伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The one stability between self and what is not-self, and the one and only difference, is not an identity that is part and parcel of constantly changing physical framework, not the outer ego whose conception of who it is constantly changes, according to its age and environment, but the inner self behind all physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 自我与非我之间唯一的稳定状态，也是唯一且仅有的差异，并非不断变化的物质架构中固有的身份认同，也不是那个根据年龄和环境不断改变自我认知的外在自我，而是所有物质建构背后的内在自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Such an outer ego turned inner ego, has only experienced existence then upon a particular plane. It is therefore filled with impatience as far as existence upon other planes are concerned; and therefore if it developed upon your plane initially, it will not choose to initiate anew there, but will choose other planes of activity.
quotes.translation: 这样的外在自我一旦转向内在自我，便只经历过特定层面的存在。因此，它对其他层面的存在充满不耐；若它最初在你的层面发展，便不会选择在此重新开始，而会转向其他活动层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It senses realities usually closed to it. It thinks, "There is more, but beyond I cannot follow." Here with this realization the inner ego may suddenly open. Intuitive springs rush to the surface, and because the outer ego has already been alerted, it is able to accept these realities while still performing its ordinary duties.
quotes.translation: 它感知到通常对其封闭的实相。它想："还有更多，但我无法追随。"在此领悟中，内在自我可能突然开启。直觉的泉涌喷薄而出，由于外在自我已受到警觉，它便能在履行日常职责的同时接纳这些实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner self obviously needs the outer ego with its outer senses, in order to permit its own materialization in various camouflage forms. This should not be underrated or forgotten. Without the outer core, the inner self could simply not add to its own value fulfillment through participation in energy-constructs （hyphen）.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然需要拥有外在感官的外在自我，才能以各种伪装形态实现自身物质化。这一点不应被低估或遗忘。若没有外在核心，内在自体便无法通过参与能量建构来增益自身的价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指导内在自体活动的内在自我。接下来的一步应当清晰明了：大体而言，自我处理的是次级实相，而内在自我处理的是原初实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The inner ego sees and knows itself as a part of this action or happening, and sees the entire identity existing in various dimensions simultaneously. The outer ego attempts to cut action short, and so its viewpoint is limited by its own attempt. It perceives its birth and its death, but not beyond its birth or its death.
quotes.translation: 内在自我视自身为这行动或事件的一部分，并看见整个身份同时存在于不同维度中。外在自我则试图截断行动，因此其视角受限于自身企图。它感知自身的出生与死亡，却无法看见出生之前或死亡之后。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is however a portion of you, the deeper identity who forms both the inner ego and the outer ego, who decided that you would be a physical being in this place and in this time. This is the core of your identity, the psychic seed from which you sprang, the multidimensional personality of which you are part.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们有一部分更深层的身份，既形成了内我，也形成了外我，正是这部分决定了你会在此时此地成为物质存在。这是你身份的核心，是你从中萌发的灵性种子，是你所属的多维人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is quite true that the inner ego is aware through the inner senses of any choices that the outer ego will make with the use of free will. This does not mean that decisions are in any way predetermined. It only means that the inner ego is not bound by the dimensions in which those free will choices are made.
quotes.translation: 内我确实能通过内在感官预知外我将运用自由意志做出的任何选择。但这并不意味着决定是预先注定的，只说明内我不受那些自由意志选择发生的维度所束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The knowledge then available is first of all creative, intuitive knowledge which the outer ego may translate into intellectual terms when possible. But it is no longer fearful of intuitive data. It no longer fights the inner senses, nor does it fear for its own survival in the midst of intuitional onrushes.
quotes.translation: 因此可用的知识首先是创造性的直觉知识，外我可能时将其转化为理性术语。但它不再惧怕直觉资料，不再对抗内在感官，也不在直觉涌现时担忧自身存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are shadings and variations and that is all. The inner ego is that part of the inner self which is closely allied with the outer ego, in that it is to some degree a director of function and activity. But it is not sharply focused. It looks inward. Here we run into some language difficulty.
quotes.translation: 只有层次与变化，仅此而已。内在自我是内在自体中与外在自我紧密相连的部分，它在某种程度上是功能与活动的指挥者，但它的焦点并不锐利，而是向内观照。在此我们遇到了一些语言上的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Force of various kinds is also exerted by these fields upon your universe. Until it is thoroughly understood little real progress can be made. Mankind still deals with surfaces, depending mainly as he does upon the powers of the outer ego, whose purpose it is to deal only with surface reality.
quotes.translation: 这些场域也以各种力量作用于你们的宇宙。除非彻底理解这一点，否则难有真正的进展。人类仍停留在表面，主要依赖外在自我的能力——而外在自我的目的正是仅处理表面现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The outer ego, being of later development, is jealous of its position and would have all knowledge at its fingertips. This is impossible. It cannot stand to have anything hidden, but the very mechanism of its own behavior is hidden from itself, and it knows only the feel of its own surfaces.
quotes.translation: 外在自我作为较晚发展的部分，对自己的地位充满戒备，渴望掌握所有知识。但这绝无可能。它无法容忍任何隐藏之物，然而它自身行为的运作机制却对其隐藏，它只能感知自身表面的触感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Without the determination of the inner ego, cohesion of identity would be impossible. The self as you know it is many things, and contains many more vestibules and rooms than you now imagine. Even the outer ego contains multitudinous chambers and interconnections of which you are unaware.
quotes.translation: 若无内在自我的决断，身份认同的凝聚便不可能。你所认知的自我包含诸多面向，其内在的门厅与房间远比你此刻想象的更为繁复。即便是外在自我，也蕴藏着无数你尚未察觉的密室与交错联结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that such surface reality is not vital and important, or that some information about its own nature cannot be gleaned from its study; but only a small amount can be so obtained. The other fields of which I speak exert their influences upon the physical organism as it exists. These forces are dealt with and balanced by the subconscious, and not by the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 这并非说表面实相无关紧要，或无法从其研究中获取关于自身本质的些许信息；但能获取的终究有限。我所提及的其他场域，会对物质有机体施加影响，这些力量由潜意识而非外在自我处理与平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now if there is good communication between the self, that is the inner self and the outer ego, then the ego begins to understand what it is, and also to realize that it has greater capacities than it can realize by continued reincarnations, upon one plane.
quotes.translation: 若自我——即内在自我与外在自我——之间保持良好沟通，外在自我便会开始理解自身本质，并意识到它拥有远超在单一层面通过连续转世所能领悟的更大能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The "outer ego" and the inner ego operate together, the one to enable you to manipulate in the world that you know, the other to bring you those delicate inner perceptions without which physical existence could not be maintained.
quotes.translation: "外在自我"与内在自我共同运作，前者使你能够在已知的世界中操控，后者则带给你那些细腻的内在感知，没有这些感知，物质存在便无法维持。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I do not mean to underestimate the outer ego. You have simply overestimated it. Nor has its true nature been recognized.
quotes.translation: 我并非意在低估外在自我。你只是过分高估了它。它的真实本质也尚未被认清。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json
